items.title: CORTIS first comeback since debut: 2nd EP 'GREENGREEN' drops May 4
items.description: HYBE's 5-member group CORTIS has surpassed 2 million in pre-orders for their 2nd EP GREENGREEN, with pre-release single 'REDRED' out on April 20.

items.title: BTS 'ARIRANG' World Tour · Tampa dates added
items.description: BTS confirms 4 nights at Raymond James Stadium in Tampa, FL starting April 25, 2026.

items.title: IVE kicks off Asia leg of 'SHOW WHAT I AM' tour in Osaka
items.description: IVE plays 2 nights at Osaka-jo Hall before heading to Manila.

items.title: LE SSERAFIM announces 'PUREFLOW pt. 1' for May 22
items.description: HYBE/SOURCE confirms comeback date for LE SSERAFIM's new single.

items.title: aespa's second full album release window narrows to mid-May
items.description: SM Entertainment teases aespa's highly anticipated 2nd full album.

items.title: ENHYPEN 'BLOOD SAGA' Seoul concerts sell out in 4 minutes
items.description: All 3 nights at KSPO Dome gone in under 5 minutes; additional São Paulo and Las Vegas dates confirmed.
